main.description: A verifiable link between an ATProto DID and an EVM wallet address, with platform attestation. The user proves wallet ownership via EIP-712 signature, and the platform co-signs to attest the linking occurred through a trusted service.

name.description: Optional user-defined name for this wallet link (e.g. 'Personal Wallet', 'Project Treasury'). Helps users identify which wallet this record represents when they have multiple linked wallets.

userProof.description: User's cryptographic proof of wallet ownership. Open union to support future signature methods (ERC-1271, ERC-6492).

platformAttestation.description: Platform's co-signature attesting that this link was created through the trusted service. Open union to support future attestation methods.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.

eip712Proof.description: EOA wallet ownership proof via EIP-712 typed data signature.

signature.description: User's ECDSA signature over the EIP-712 hash (hex-encoded with 0x prefix, 64 or 65 bytes).

message.description: The EIP-712 structured message fields that were signed.

eip712Message.description: The EIP-712 typed data message signed by the user's wallet.

did.description: The ATProto DID being linked to the EVM address.

evmAddress.description: The EVM wallet address (must match the top-level address field).

chainId.description: EVM chain ID as string (bigint serialized). The EIP-712 domain is chain-specific; verifiers should treat this attestation as valid only for the specified chain.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the attestation was created (bigint serialized).

eip712PlatformAttestation.description: Platform's EIP-712 attestation that this DID-wallet link was created through a trusted service. The platform signs over the user's signature to bind its attestation to the specific linking event.

signature.description: Platform's ECDSA signature over the signedData (hex-encoded with 0x prefix, 64 or 65 bytes).

platformAddress.description: The platform's signing wallet address (0x-prefixed). Verifiers should check this against known/trusted platform addresses.

signedData.description: The user's signature that the platform signed over (hex-encoded with 0x prefix). This binds the platform attestation to the specific user proof.
